reviews.review_text: After travelling all day and not sure where too stop we were welcomed and made too feel at home.Supplied with a cabin for my sister and powered site for me and my pooch.Dave was exceptional with his help.Stayed on extra night cos we felt so at home.Planning a trip back b4 Farina bakery season closes and Copley definetely the only place we will stay.Magnificent 10/10
Awesome park basic but good clean amenities great bakery park owner a great bloke to have a yarn with very friendly

Very quiet clean country town where the flies outnumber the population. Lol. Cabins omg spotlessly clean, goid wifi, 25 mins to lyndhurst, from there is 1hr to Marree is nice and green there at moment will be years before it be green again must go Copley pub food is a good decent serve, the caravan park is very helpful and has great coffee
Very neat and tidy park, toilets, showers, and laundry were spotlessly clean. What a great bloke Dave is,real down to earth character. Thanks Millsey.
very nice place to stay the owners very nice people and rooms good set up
Quite park, facilities good cleaned every day. Shirley the owner five stars. Lovely Lady and just so helpful.

Copley caravan park is a great place to rest and unwind after spending 5 nights bush camping in the northern flinders ranges. Plenty of shady trees, clean amenities and very friendly hosts.

It’s a little oasis in the outback. With a pub within staggering distance… what could possibly go wrong? 🤣

My tour business (The Offroad Tradies) stops at The Copley Bush Bakery each time we pass through and it has always been a talking point of how good it was. Not this time, the service was not great, I had to help the girl with working the eftpos machine and adding up the total. The pies were dry and nothing like previous stops, a number of guests left most of their meals on the table and we left to make our own lunch.
I really hope this is a once off as it was such a great stopping point for our tours. Hopefully better next time or I will be leaving it out of future tours.

We stay here when we’re working on the roads this way.
Really lovely owners, customer service and hospitality.
I’ve stayed in allot of places whilst working and at the end of the day I look forward to getting into bed because they’re soo comfortable and cozy.
Allot of places don’t have enough warmth / blankets in winter, this place is like getting into a bed of soft wool and you get the best nights sleep.
There cafe has the biggest savoury pastries (pies, sausage rolls and they make delicious quondong pies 😋😋)
Central location to stay if you’re travelling and want a break, plenty of room for caravans too I’ve noticed.
Beautiful sunsets and sometimes you get to see the wild horses when they pop in as well, pretty spectacular.

What a beautiful place.  After we had a small accident with our van  , The staff were so friendly and welcoming.  | we also had a meal for dinner  it was delicious and staff friendly  |Thank you for your assistance and support  highly recommended in staying at copley caravan Park  .

Warmly welcomed by the Owners and friendly staff. I had 3 nights in an exceptionally clean, well appointed cabin.|Despite being next to the main Highway the park was very quiet and not affected by road noise. |There's a bakery on site, the quondong pie is delicious. |Thoughtful, caring owners and staff who go out of their way to look after you with good old fashioned country service. 😃😃
Surprisingly good, had fresh water and a little shelter. Powered sites also available if needed.

Great little rural caravan park. Incredibly friendly and helpful staff. Large sites, potable water and electricity, plus laundry. Would definitely stay there again. There's also a cafe at the front of the park that makes great pasties and pies.

3 nights 2 adults power-water camp site August 2025.
Great amenities block great hot showers.
Sites are spacious and Dave will show you to your site.
He works tirelessly to make sure everything is okay.
Visited the cafe - it has good food.
Visited the pub - it has good food.
Thank you for providing such a comfortable and peaceful place.
Highly recommended.
Support outback communities and businesses.

Absolutely fantastic place to stay. After a last minute decision to find a room due to cold weather the night before, they were so friendly and accommodating. The room was just what we needed and very fresh and clean to top it off. We will honestly make a point of coming back because of the great service and amazing location. Thanks guys!

The folks who run the Copley Caravan Park are absolute legends. I stayed recently for 2 nights as part of an unplanned visit due to roads north of Copley being closed because of rain. We were actually a group of 20+ adults and all bunked into the comfy, clean and well appointed on-site accom. We had breakfast and dinner during our stay. Both excellent meals and very generous serves. Staff worked very hard and made our stay a real joy. Thanks for the great hospitality 🙏🙏

This place became our unintentional home away from home for 3 days while one of our groups cars broke down and was awaiting parts. Dave and the staff were absolute legends, the definition of good country people. I felt like after the 3 days we'd been friends for 20 years.

Park itself is pretty basic, but has great hot water and clean amenities. Also has a decent coin op laundry. The cabins are deceptively big and very comfortable. They also have a great fire pit area out the back with the best views of the sunset while wild horses and emus wander past near the highway.

The Cafe also serves some of the best tasting home made pies and sausage rolls you'll ever eat. Absolutely fantastic. The quandong tart is worth a try too.

We will be back and will absolutely recommend this park to anyone stopping through on their way North.

Cheers guys!

Ash & Mel
Great place to stopover.

wouldnt make me eggs then changed there mind and said eggs would take over 15 minutes, got raw chips and watery gravy and serves was so bad do not recomend this olace to anyone. also ignored me many times when asking about the quandong pie. disappointing
Had one of the best stays in copley caravan park cabins?were clean food was great and the owners were excellent and of great knowledge of the area it was a?pleasure stay there. 5 stars.
Shirley was a delight to deal and was the locals in the bakery, I enjoyed watching the horses wandering passed our cabin.

David and Shirley made this place feel like home. Care and consideration for us was above and beyond. Copley caravan park is only 5km from Leigh Creek therefore to access any food services a trip there is required.

Shirley offered to take us there or get food for us whilst our car was being repaired.

Stayed in a standard cabin with all the necessary amenities such as air conditioning, fridge/freezer, bed, kitchenette, tv, and bathroom. Cabin was quite clean

Breakfast cooked by Shirley in the morning was delicious and coffee was amazing.

If travelling this way and just need a place to stay for a day or two, please consider Copley Caravan Park.
Loved the pies for a late brunch and saved the sweets for afternoon tea!
Very helpful staff
Well done Copely van Park, went above and beyond on Sunday night for some weary travellers. Much appreciated and thank you. Great cabin, very clean and warm. Cheers
Great place to stay on your way to the Flinders or the Nilpena Edicacara National Park. Staff very helpful. Service station is very, very expensive.

From the happy jovial greeting to the great service from the lady at the coffee machine this place is a relaxed base to explore.
Clean amenities and hot showers.

Had a great outback overnight stay here. Very friendly and welcoming and had a delicious breakfast at the Cafe. Dinner at the pub, 2 min walk, with a great atmosphere and super friendly. Will definitely be back on our next trip through.

Right on the edge of the road into Arkaroola this little park has a host with a big personality.  Drive thru sites, on-site self contained cabins, older but very clean amenities and a brilliant communal fire pit with great su set views.  Visit their Quandong Cafe for excellent food and coffee and a 2 min walk up the road for a drink at the very friendly local pub. Fuel and a very obliging mechanic complete the charm of this town.
Yummy food, friendly and accommodating staff.
Great caravan park, reasonable prices, friendly and helpful staff. Added bonus is the onsite bakery with yummy pies and tarts. The amenities are kept clean.
Wonderful, welcoming, helpful, friendly, fun, informative owners and staff. Very clean facilities too.

Second time we have enjoyed an overnight stay and another wonderful experience.  Yesterday we had to wait an extra few hours due to mechanical issues and were kindly invited to wait it out at the cafe. What a joy. A laugh a minute and so hospitable. The pies and sandwiches were very yummy and the coffees were most enjoyable.
Thank you.
Well kept park but a bit isolated.  No walking  or riding trails to get into town. Only way is by car. The park is well kept and facilities were clean.
We stopped in for a meal at the cafe. Simple fare but well prepared and presented. The pies are wonderful. Copley is yet another location to launch an exploration of the Flinders Ranges.

Shirley and David saved our bacon when we broke down on the Arkaroola road. Good, basic overnight stay (with AC, fan, en suite and kitchenette) and very welcome quandong-inspired breakfast, with lots of humor, belly laughs and kindness. Can't ask more than that.
The park and amenities were very clean and tidy. The staff are very relaxed, but happy to help.
The Ensuite Cabins are decent enough for the night, clean and plenty of room. Service was great,  only disappointment was the dinner at the pub!!
Amazing little spot run by possibly the nicest people in the world. Exceptional value for money, very large and super clean cabins.

Nice place to stay plenty of room, amenities clean and friendly welcome and lots of info about the surrounding areas to explore. Cafe out the front has great coffee and food. Really enjoy our chats with Sophie and partner. Sophie is an inspiration with her trek with camels from the West cost to the east coast. We bought her book it's an fantastic read 📚 👌
The people were very friendly

Traveling through with our camper. Leigh creek CP looked very sterile so kept going to Copley. Very friendly owners & staff, got a great spot to set up camp, everything clean.Recommend. Beer, petrol, camping fees cheaper than down the road. Laughs were free.
